location: Dropped by Knight (Recusant) Bernahl when defeated — easiest fought early at the Warmaster's Shack in Limgrave, or later as a hostile invader in Crumbling Farum Azula.
tactics: Rest at the Warmaster's Shack grace (northeast of Stormhill, near where you meet Roderika), then fight Bernahl directly — treat him as a miniboss, not a trash enemy.
If missed early, he reappears as a hostile invader in Crumbling Farum Azula, but only before Maliketh has been defeated.
Once Maliketh is dead, Bernahl no longer invades in Farum Azula; New Game Plus is the only way back to that specific fight.
His moveset includes fire-infused strikes and grabs — watch for his charged jump attack and avoid greedy punishes.
lore: A scepter shaped like a serpent devouring the world, said to depict a vision Rykard glimpsed in his final moment before the Serpent-God devoured him. That vision is channeled into a skill that drains life from everything nearby.

builds.name: Strength/Faith hybrid drainer
builds.why: D-scaling Str, Dex, and Faith plus its Devourer of Worlds skill (an AoE HP-drain ground slam) suit an aggressive Faith-hybrid build that wants group sustain built into the weapon itself.
